changelog: Initial seed library: FM-001..FM-008 from conversion experience, FM-009..FM-018 from the methodology validation catalog (spec Ch. 6).

failure_modes.name: Loan outstanding-balance carry-over
failure_modes.description: Converted loan balances diverge from source because payment-application order, accrual basis, and per-period rounding rules differ between platforms.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Loan L2 target outstanding balance 10398.55 vs source 10432.17 (delta -33.62) after a payment was applied out of order.
failure_modes.remediation: Recompute amortization from origination; verify payment application order and accrual basis on the target.

failure_modes.name: Participant-level vesting schedule mapping
failure_modes.description: Vested percentages drift because service-counting method (elapsed time vs. hours) and schedule mapping differ; entry-date handling compounds the drift.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Participant P0017 vested 60% in target while canonical schedule plus service recomputes to 80%.
failure_modes.remediation: Reconcile schedule definitions and service-computation method before re-mapping participant service.

failure_modes.name: Custom calculated-field dependencies
failure_modes.description: Source-side scripted/derived fields (e.g., OmniScript logic) have no target equivalent; target values appear with no mapping-rule provenance.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Target field svc_points populated with values traceable to no mapping rule in the workbook.
failure_modes.remediation: Inventory source scripts; re-implement or retire each derived field explicitly.

failure_modes.name: Plan-provision mismatches
failure_modes.description: Provision configuration (safe harbor, catch-up eligibility, auto-enrollment/auto-increase parameters) maps imperfectly into the target's provision model.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Safe-harbor flag dropped on one plan; catch-up eligibility inverted.
failure_modes.remediation: Provision-by-provision review against the plan document; correct target plan setup, not the data.

failure_modes.name: Sort order / encoding sensitivity (EBCDIC vs. ASCII)
failure_modes.description: EBCDIC-to-ASCII transitions garble extended characters (mojibake) and silently change collation: EBCDIC sorts digits after letters, ASCII the reverse.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Target name renders 'JosÃ© RamÃ­rez'; an ordered extract diverges at the first digit-vs-letter boundary.
failure_modes.remediation: Normalize collation explicitly in extract jobs; never rely on platform-default sort. Re-decode affected fields with the correct codepage.

failure_modes.name: Packed/binary field handling
failure_modes.description: COMP-3 packed-decimal fields decoded with the wrong implied-decimal position or sign-nibble convention produce powers-of-ten errors and flipped signs.
failure_modes.sample_defect: One packed amount decoded x100 (implied decimal lost); one sign nibble read F as D flipping the amount negative.
failure_modes.remediation: Correct the copybook layout (decimals, sign convention) and re-ingest; cross-check the file control total.

failure_modes.name: Balance / count-balance totals
failure_modes.description: Sums and counts fail to reconcile at plan, fund, or participant level. The master reconciliation mode; a coarse-level variance is always decomposable to finer levels.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Plan-level PRETAX total off by 0.01 across 120 participants.
failure_modes.remediation: Drill from plan variance to money type to investment to participant to isolate the contributing records.

failure_modes.name: Date and format drift
failure_modes.description: Century-window expansion errors, Julian-to-Gregorian conversion faults, and inconsistent zero/blank-date semantics shift or invent dates.
failure_modes.sample_defect: DOB 1897-03-12 produced by a wrong century window; a zero date mapped to 0001-01-01 instead of null.
failure_modes.remediation: Define null-date semantics per field in the layout spec; correct windowing rules in extract or transform.

failure_modes.name: Participant count mismatch by status
failure_modes.description: Participant counts by canonical status differ between source and target, usually from status-code crosswalk gaps or dropped records.
failure_modes.sample_defect: One TERMINATED participant counted ACTIVE in target; ACTIVE 87 vs 88, TERMINATED 25 vs 24.
failure_modes.remediation: Audit the status crosswalk; trace each variance to its participant via the referential orphan report.

failure_modes.name: Missing key fields
failure_modes.description: Required identity fields (SSN, DOB, plan ID) arrive null or blank on the target, blocking downstream processing.
failure_modes.sample_defect: One target participant with blank SSN.
failure_modes.remediation: Trace to source: distinguish genuinely missing source data (cleanup item) from values dropped in transform (mapping fix).

failure_modes.name: Duplicate participant IDs / SSNs
failure_modes.description: Duplicate participant IDs or SSNs within a plan on the target, typically from merge logic or rehire-history handling.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Two target participants share SSN 900-44-1207 within the same plan.
failure_modes.remediation: Resolve identity: merge true duplicates, re-key false ones; review rehire-history load logic.

failure_modes.name: Balance mismatch by money type
failure_modes.description: Money-type subtotals fail to reconcile, commonly from crosswalk gaps or source combinations mapped into the wrong target bucket.
failure_modes.sample_defect: ROTH subtotal variance of 250.00 on one plan while the plan total reconciles (offsetting PRETAX variance).
failure_modes.remediation: Audit the money-type crosswalk; drill the variance to participant level within the affected money type.

failure_modes.name: Balance mismatch by investment option
failure_modes.description: Investment-level subtotals fail to reconcile, commonly from fund-mapping gaps, share-class consolidation, or price-date misalignment.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Fund F03 subtotal variance; units correct but valued at the wrong price date.
failure_modes.remediation: Audit the investment crosswalk and pricing as-of dates; drill to participant positions in the affected fund.

failure_modes.name: Loan count / missing repayment terms
failure_modes.description: Loan counts differ, or converted loans arrive without repayment schedule, payment amount, or maturity date.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Loan count 5 vs 6 on one plan; one converted loan missing its maturity date.
failure_modes.remediation: Reconcile the loan extract row-by-row; verify paid-off/deemed loans are filtered consistently on both sides.

failure_modes.name: Contribution & distribution totals
failure_modes.description: Employee/employer contribution totals for the last payroll cycle, or recent distribution totals, fail to reconcile.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Employer match total for the final pre-conversion payroll cycle off by one participant's contribution.
failure_modes.remediation: Verify cutover-period transaction inclusion rules (trade date vs. payroll date) on both extracts.

failure_modes.name: Field-length violations & invalid characters
failure_modes.description: Values exceed target field limits or contain characters the target rejects; truncation corrupts names and addresses silently.
failure_modes.sample_defect: 41-character address loaded into a 35-character field; '#' present in a name field.
failure_modes.remediation: Apply documented truncation/substitution rules in transform; never let the target platform truncate implicitly.

failure_modes.name: Invalid / future dates
failure_modes.description: Logically impossible dates: DOB in the future, termination before hire, dates outside plausible ranges.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Termination date 2019-05-01 precedes hire date 2021-03-15 for one participant.
failure_modes.remediation: Trace to source vs. transform origin; fix windowing or field-swap defects; route true source errors to cleanup.

failure_modes.name: Unexpected negative balances
failure_modes.description: Negative balances on the target with no explaining loan or adjustment context, often from sign-handling or reversal-ordering faults.
failure_modes.sample_defect: Negative MATCH balance of -412.06 for one participant with no offsetting adjustment.
failure_modes.remediation: Trace the contributing transactions; check reversal ordering and sign handling in the load.
